tools.name: get-annotated-message
tools.title: Get Annotated Message Tool
tools.description: Demonstrates how annotations can be used to provide metadata about content.

tools.name: get-env
tools.title: Print Environment Tool
tools.description: Returns all environment variables, helpful for debugging MCP server configuration

tools.name: get-resource-links
tools.title: Get Resource Links Tool
tools.description: Returns up to ten resource links that reference different types of resources

tools.name: get-resource-reference
tools.title: Get Resource Reference Tool
tools.description: Returns a resource reference that can be used by MCP clients

tools.name: get-roots-list
tools.title: Get Roots List Tool
tools.description: Lists the current MCP roots provided by the client. Demonstrates the roots protocol capability even though this server doesn't access files.

tools.name: get-structured-content
tools.title: Get Structured Content Tool
tools.description: Returns structured content along with an output schema for client data validation

tools.name: get-sum
tools.title: Get Sum Tool
tools.description: Returns the sum of two numbers

tools.name: get-tiny-image
tools.title: Get Tiny Image Tool
tools.description: Returns a tiny MCP logo image.

tools.name: gzip-file-as-resource
tools.title: GZip File as Resource Tool
tools.description: Compresses a single file using gzip compression. Depending upon the selected output type, returns either the compressed data as a gzipped resource or a resource link, allowing it to be downloaded in a subsequent request during the current session.

tools.name: toggle-simulated-logging
tools.title: Toggle Simulated Logging
tools.description: Toggles simulated, random-leveled logging on or off.

tools.name: toggle-subscriber-updates
tools.title: Toggle Subscriber Updates
tools.description: Toggles simulated resource subscription updates on or off.

tools.name: trigger-elicitation-request-async
tools.title: Trigger Async Elicitation Request Tool
tools.description: Trigger an async elicitation request that the CLIENT executes as a background task. Demonstrates bidirectional MCP tasks where the server sends an elicitation request and the client handles user input asynchronously, allowing the server to poll for completion.

tools.name: trigger-elicitation-request
tools.title: Trigger Elicitation Request Tool
tools.description: Trigger a Request from the Server for User Elicitation

tools.name: trigger-long-running-operation
tools.title: Trigger Long Running Operation Tool
tools.description: Demonstrates a long running operation with progress updates.

tools.name: trigger-sampling-request-async
tools.title: Trigger Async Sampling Request Tool
tools.description: Trigger an async sampling request that the CLIENT executes as a background task. Demonstrates bidirectional MCP tasks where the server sends a request and the client executes it asynchronously, allowing the server to poll for progress and results.

tools.name: trigger-sampling-request
tools.title: Trigger Sampling Request Tool
tools.description: Trigger a Request from the Server for LLM Sampling
